ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., Charter, District, Public) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information (phone, email) */,
  "principal" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type FOREIGN KEY ("school_type") REFERENCES school_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the budget is allocated to */,
  "budget_amount" TEXT /* Total budget amount allocated to the school */,
  "budget_year" INTEGER /* Year the budget is allocated for */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the budget (e.g., salaries, materials, technology) */,
  "allocated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or department allocating the budget */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or department approving the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the enrollment is for */,
  "enrollment_size" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the enrollment is for */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of students (e.g., K-5, 6-8, 9-12) */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of students (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution of students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the metric is for */,
  "math_score" TEXT /* Average math score of the school */,
  "reading_score" TEXT /* Average reading score of the school */,
  "passing_math" TEXT /* Percentage of students passing math */,
  "passing_reading" TEXT /* Percentage of students passing reading */,
  "passing_both" TEXT /* Percentage of students passing both math and reading */,
  "graduation_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of students graduating on time */,
  "attendance_rate" TEXT /* Average attendance rate of students */,
  "standardized_test_score" TEXT /* Average score on standardized tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, teacher, district official) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is for */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the platform (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, budget) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the report file (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
